hero.headline: Training plans that coaches build and athletes actually follow
hero.subheadline: Synek organises your coaching week — athlete by athlete, session by session. Your athletes see exactly what's ahead.
hero.betaNote: Your feedback shapes what we build next.

whySynek.title: How it works
whySynek.subtitle: Built around the coaching week, not around features.

card1.title: Weekly structure
card1.desc: Plan each week as a complete unit — sessions, load, rest. See the whole picture before athletes start.

card2.title: Coach visibility
card2.desc: See what every athlete completes, how they feel, and where the plan needs adjusting.

card3.title: Athlete buy-in
card3.desc: Athletes can log sessions, add notes, and optionally plan their own weeks.

card4.title: Built with early users
card4.desc: This is beta. Every piece of feedback you send changes what we build next.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Structured training tools for coaches. No extra features, no clutter.

item1.title: Weekly planning
item1.desc: Organise sessions by day, set weekly load, and leave coaching notes — all in one view.

item2.title: Sport-specific sessions
item2.desc: Run, cycling, strength, yoga, swimming, mobility, rest — each with the right fields.

item3.title: Coach & athlete roles
item3.desc: Coaches manage multiple athletes. Each athlete sees only their own plan.

item4.title: Self-planning mode
item4.desc: Let experienced athletes plan their own weeks. You still see everything.

item5.title: Strava sync
item5.desc: Link Strava and completed activities fill in automatically.

login.title: Log in to Synek
login.subtitle: Pick up where you left off.

beta.title: Create your free account
beta.subtitle: Free during beta. No credit card. No expiry.
beta.betaNote: You're joining our public beta. Free access, and a direct line to the team — we read every piece of feedback.
beta.name: Full name
beta.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number
beta.selectRole: Pick Coach or Athlete to continue
beta.emailAlreadyRegistered: That email is already registered. Try logging in instead.

contact.title: Write to us
contact.subtitle: Got feedback, a question, or an idea? We're a small team and we read everything.
contact.betaNote: This is the fastest way to shape what we build next.
contact.name: Your name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's missing, what's broken, or what could be better...
contact.submitSuccess: Message sent — thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
